sections.paragraph:
ἐπανόρθωσις, εως, ἡ ‘correcting, restoration’ (cp. e.g. ISardGauthier 3, 1 ‘restoration’ of a city; 1 Esdr 8:52; 1 Macc 14:34) then in transf. sense improvement (Ps.-Pla., Tim. L., 104a; Heraclid. Lembus, Pol. 14 [Aristot., Fgm. 611, 14 Rose]; Plut., Mor. 22a; 46d al.—ἐ. τοῦ βίου: Polyb. 1, 35, 1; cp. the verb ἐπανορθόω Strabo 9, 1, 20; Epict. 3, 21, 15 οὕτως ὠφέλιμα γίνεται τὰ μυστήρια … , ὅτι ἐπὶ ἐπανορθώσει τ. βίου κατεστάθη πάντα … , cp. Enchir. 51, 1; Iambl., Vi. Pyth. 6, 30; 21, 96 πρὸς ἐ.; POxy 78, 29; 237 VIII, 30; EpArist 130; 283 πρὸς ἐ.; Philo, Ebr. 91 πρὸς ἐ., Conf. Lingu. 182, Leg. All. 1, 85; cp. 2 Macc 2:22) ὠφέλιμος πρὸς ἐ. useful for improvement 2 Ti 3:16.—B. 751. New Docs 2, 84. DELG s.v. ὀρθός. TW. Spicq.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

ISardGauthier ISardGauthier = Nouvelles inscriptions de Sardes II, ed. PGauthier—List 3

transf. transf. = transferred

Ps. Ps. = pseudo, pseudonymous

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

  1. L. = KLachmann, editor of the Greek NT (1842–50)—List 1, beg.

Heraclid Heraclid , perieg., III–II b.c.—List 5

Pol Pol = Polycarp to the Philippians—List 1

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Iambl Iambl , phil., III–IV a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 359
